about.title: About EcoLogic
about.missionText: To make invisible environmental impact visible, and empower everyone to make more conscious decisions.
about.conceptText: "Invisible Impact" explores how our daily choices - what we eat, how we travel, what we buy - affect the environment in ways we don't always see.
about.aiText: In this project, AI serves as a tool for creating visual content, but the concept, design decisions, and messaging remain entirely human.

process.title: Design Process
process.subtitle: HUMAN * AI - How we integrated artificial intelligence in design
process.constraintText: We chose to limit AI use to creating raw materials only. All design decisions, composition, and messaging remained in human hands.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: EcoLogic respects your privacy. This policy explains how we collect and use information.
privacy.collectText: We collect anonymous usage data to improve the experience. We do not collect personally identifiable information without your consent.
privacy.useText: Information is used to improve content, personalize the experience, and conduct academic research on environmental education.
privacy.shareText: We do not sell or share personal information with third parties for commercial purposes.
privacy.contactText: For questions about this privacy policy, contact us at: privacy@ecologic.org.il

footer.builtWith: Built with love for the environment
